testcase.name: updateUser_emailExists()

failure.message: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: expected: <Email already exists> but was: <Email is already registered>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: expected: <Email already exists> but was: <Email is already registered> at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.build(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:151) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.buildAndThrow(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:132) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.failNotEqual(AssertEquals.java:197) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.assertEquals(AssertEquals.java:182) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.assertEquals(AssertEquals.java:177) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals(Assertions.java:1145) at app//com.badminton.service.UserServiceTest.updateUser_emailExists(UserServiceTest.java:193) at java.base@17.0.12/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:568) at java.base@17.0.12/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base@17.0.12/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511)

testcase.name: updateUser_usernameExists()

failure.message: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: expected: <Username already exists> but was: <Username is already taken>
